svg.title: CRE Deal Agent v2 — State Schema Architecture
svg.desc: Full whiteboard diagram showing the v2 CRE deal agent state schema, 7 agents, 6 stages, park and monitor fallback, and error paths.
svg.text: CRE deal agent v2 — state schema
State flows left → right through 6 stages. Error path drops down. Park & monitor loops back.
— parallel subagents fire simultaneously in stage 3 —
State object — what lives in each field
cap ceiling, asset class, buy box, metric thresholds
Manny's 10: NOI, cap rate, DSCR, IRR, LTV…
IRR at exit cap +50bps, occupancy −10%, etc.
offer price, target cap rate, decision confidence
retries on schedule — increments retry_count in state
